title: Five Masters
content:
The 
Five Masters
 are the five beings regarded to be some of the most powerful and renowned cultivators in the 
Ancient Primordial Star System.
 They are all at least at the late-stage 
Arcane Void
 realm of the Third Step. They are equivalent to the 
Eight Ancient Imperial Concubines
 of the Outer 
Ancient Celestial Realm
 in power and authority.
